evidence.API_evidence: API documentation exists with endpoints like 'https://api.airfranceklm.com/opendata/flightstatus' and API key authentication. Getting Started guide shows how to make API requests with curl examples.
evidence.SDK_evidence: No SDKs or client libraries documented. Only curl examples provided.
evidence.AI_evidence: No AI models, agents, or AI-related resources found.
evidence.language_evidence: All content appears in English only. No language switcher or country-specific domains found.

coding_notes: API=1 based on documented endpoints and API key authentication. METH=1 (GET only) based on curl example showing GET request. ROLE=1 because developers must register, create projects, and some APIs require approval ('Review required' tag). DATA=1 because Legal section exists with cookie policy and terms. CERT=1 because some APIs require approval process ('Review required'). OPEN=1 because registration is free and self-service ('absolutely free').
